title: ### II. | MODULE STRUCTURE FORMAT
content:
### II. | MODULE STRUCTURE FORMAT

Each exported module follows this exact structure:

```md
## ::[OBJECT_ID]
**Title:** [Descriptive Title]
**Ref ID:** [Unique System Reference Code]
**Folder:** [Archive Insertion Path]
**Filename:** [File Name for Notes/GitHub]

---

### I. | CONTEXT
[Brief paragraph of what this entry is, what layer it connects to, and why it matters.]

---

### II. | CONTENT
[Body of the entry, chunked and optimized for copy-paste. Include all tags, classifications, and formatting.]

---

### III. | NEXT STEPS
[What this module leads to: new threads, design stages, or data references.]
